name: yoroll-test-plugin
description: Choose a Yoroll creation in public MCP cards and sign in only when an account operation starts.

interface.shortDescription: Create workflows and media with Yoroll MCP
interface.longDescription: A test-environment preview with public MCP App cards for choosing and configuring interactive games, images, and videos. OAuth is requested only when a protected account, project, generation, editing, or publishing tool is called. All business changes use Yoroll MCP; no Browser pairing or platform-frontend automation is part of this preview.
defaultPrompt: Show me the Yoroll creation options
Create an interactive game with Yoroll
Show my Yoroll projects and continue one
Generate a standalone image or video with Yoroll
